headline: Honeywell Aerospace secures IndiGo avionics contract and Aeromexico runway safety rollout
summary: Honeywell Aerospace (NASDAQ:HONAV) announced on Monday that it has been selected by IndiGo to provide avionics and power systems for 810 Airbus A320neo-family aircraft. The company also revealed that Aeromexico plans to introduce Honeywell’s runway safety technology across a fleet of more than 100 Boeing aircraft.

raw.headline: Honeywell Aerospace secures IndiGo avionics contract and Aeromexico runway safety rollout
raw.summary: Honeywell Aerospace (NASDAQ:HONAV) announced on Monday that it has been selected by IndiGo to provide avionics and power systems for 810 Airbus A320neo-family aircraft. The company also revealed that Aeromexico plans to introduce Honeywell’s runway safety technology across a fleet of more than 100 Boeing aircraft.

headline: IndiGo makes historic selection of Honeywell Aerospace avionics and APUs to equip 810 new Airbus aircraft in fleet expansion
summary: Honeywell Aerospace (Nasdaq: HONA) today announced that IndiGo, India's largest airline and one of the fastest‑growing carriers globally, has selected Honeywell Aerospace's flagship avionics and power systems for its record‑breaking order of 810 new Airbus A320neo family aircraft. This agreement represents the largest new-aircraft-selectable equipment win in Honeywell Aerospace history, accelerating the company's expansion.

raw.headline: IndiGo makes historic selection of Honeywell Aerospace avionics and APUs to equip 810 new Airbus aircraft in fleet expansion
raw.summary: Honeywell Aerospace (Nasdaq: HONA) today announced that IndiGo, India's largest airline and one of the fastest‑growing carriers globally, has selected Honeywell Aerospace's flagship avionics and power systems for its record‑breaking order of 810 new Airbus A320neo family aircraft. This agreement represents the largest new-aircraft-selectable equipment win in Honeywell Aerospace history, accelerating the company's expansion.

headline: Honeywell Aerospace runway safety technology selected by Aeromexico for intended deployment on more than 100 aircraft
summary: Honeywell Aerospace (Nasdaq: HONA) today announced that Aeromexico intends to adopt its newest and most advanced runway safety technology, known as Surface Alerts (SURF-A), across the carrier's entire Boeing 737 NG and 737 MAX fleet of more than 100 aircraft.
